Manage Consent

To provide the best experiences, we use technologies like cookies to store and/or access device information. Consenting to these technologies will allow us to process data such as browsing behavior or unique IDs on this site. Not consenting or withdrawing consent, may adversely affect certain features and functions.

FunctionalFunctional
Always active

The technical storage or access is strictly necessary for the legitimate purpose of enabling the use of a specific service explicitly requested by the subscriber or user, or for the sole purpose of carrying out the transmission of a communication over an electronic communications network.

PreferencesPreferences

The technical storage or access is necessary for the legitimate purpose of storing preferences that are not requested by the subscriber or user.

StatisticsStatistics

The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for statistical purposes.The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for anonymous statistical purposes. Without a subpoena, voluntary compliance on the part of your Internet Service Provider, or additional records from a third party, information stored or retrieved for this purpose alone cannot usually be used to identify you.

MarketingMarketing

The technical storage or access is required to create user profiles to send advertising, or to track the user on a website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes.

# Member Benefits

- [Home](https://www.seiu509.org/)
- [For Members](https://www.seiu509.org/members/)
- Member Benefits

As a member or retiree of SEIU 509, you have access to a variety of services and discounts through SEIU Member Benefits. These benefits supplement what you may receive through your union-negotiated contract.

You can save on life and liability insurance, health services, mortgages, travel, legal services and more. Visit [www.seiumb.com](http://www.seiumb.com/) to register and take advantage of this program! For questions about the SEIU Member Benefits program, you must contact them directly. Click [here](https://www.seiumb.com/contact-us) for the SEIU Member Benefits contact page.

## 2026 Local 509 Scholarships

**2026 Scholarships applications are now closed.** **Winners will be announced on May 22, 2026.**

**\\*\\* Public Sector members are awarded scholarships separately from the SEIU 509—Commonwealth Fund. Click [here](https://www.509training.org/scholarships) to visit their website for more details if you are a state worker. \*\***

### About the SEIU 509 Scholarship Program

The Annual SEIU 509 Scholarship Program funds educational scholarship awards for SEIU 509 union members from the **Elder Services, Family Child Care, Higher Ed,** and **Private Sector Human Services** chapters, and their eligible dependents.

Scholarships are applied to **tuition only**, and must be used within the **2026-2027 academic year** (Summer or Fall of 2026 or Spring of 2027).

**Dependents are defined** as children of members, or children under direct care of the member — such as a grandchild or foster child. **If you are applying on behalf of yourself & dependent(s), or multiple dependents**, please submit all names on the same application (see instructions below).

**Scholarships range from $1,000 to $1,500.** Some awards honor a member’s activism and demonstrated commitment to the union’s growth over the last calendar year. Others are assigned to a specific sector, or officers or stewards. From this pool of qualified applicants, winners are drawn at random.

### Full Program Guidelines

- **The application deadline is April 10, 2026 at 5 PM.**
- The applicant must be a current dues-paying member of the **Private Sector, Elder Services, Family Childcare, or Higher Ed Chapter**. The member must be considered a “member in good standing” as defined in the [SEIU 509 Constitution](https://www.seiu509.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/SEIU-Local-509-Constitution-and-Code-of-Ethics-June-2025.pdf).
- **Members can also apply for a dependent, which are defined as:** children of the member or children under direct care of the member, such as a grandchild or foster child.
- Members **must** be enrolled in an undergraduate, graduate or PhD program.
- Dependents of members can be high school seniors or currently enrolled in undergraduate studies at an accredited educational institution.
- **ONCE WINNERS ARE CHOSEN, ENROLLMENT VERIFICATION IS REQUIRED**—if enrollment cannot be confirmed by **May 4**, the awards will go to the runner up.
- **The awards will only be paid to the educational institution with proof of enrollment.**
- No member or dependent may be awarded more than one SEIU 509 scholarship per academic year. If a member or dependent has won an SEIU 509 scholarship in a previous year, they are still eligible to apply and win this year.
- Winners for all awards will be selected at random from the pool of qualified applicants.
- **Scholarship winners will be announced to all members on May 22, 2026.**

Questions about the SEIU 509 Scholarship Program?

**Contact [Jenny Bauer](https://www.seiu509.org/member-benefits/jbauer@seiu509.org).**

[APPLY HERE!](https://act.seiu.org/a/2026-scholarship)
